notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: Sorry, the page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

error.title: Oops! Something went wrong
error.description: We encountered an unexpected problem. Please try again or go back to the previous page.

globalError.title: Oops! Something went wrong
globalError.description: We encountered an unexpected problem. Please reload the page or go back to the home page.

searchResults.title: No results found
searchResults.description: We couldn't find results for "{query}". Try using different or more generic terms.

cart.title: Your cart is empty
cart.description: Add products to your cart to continue shopping and complete your order.

orders.title: No orders yet
orders.description: You haven't placed any orders yet. Explore the marketplace and find amazing products!

wishlist.title: Empty wishlist
wishlist.description: Add products to your wishlist to save them and buy them later.

products.title: No products registered
products.description: Start by adding your first product to start selling on the marketplace.

stores.title: No stores found
stores.description: We couldn't find stores matching your search. Try adjusting the filters.
